title: Rêves
full_description: Six Ukrainian men take the stage — six boys shaped by an awareness of the perfect gesture and carried by the desire to be there, alive and strong. Rêves is a show about memory and childhood, a meditation on life, death and God, and a powerful evocation of a world where the scent of flowers haunts the dreams of a man caught between past and present. Their homeland seems to vibrate underfoot as they embody the power of a people facing violence — but never losing hope.
ai_summary: Six Ukrainian circus artists perform a deeply moving work about memory, childhood, and resilience — beginning in childhood innocence and tracing a journey through violence and grief without surrendering hope. A powerful statement from the country's contemporary circus scene, infused with physical theatre and juggling.
